license_strategy: Do not ingest copyrighted/prohibited pages into embeddings. Use only allowed public-domain/copyright-free government content plus original synthesis, with final legal review.

excluded_sources.title: MedlinePlus / A.D.A.M. Medical Encyclopedia pages
excluded_sources.reason: The page terms explicitly prohibit automated extraction and AI/RAG dataset or embedding use without express written consent.

excluded_sources.title: Commercial manuals, blogs, private clinics, WebMD/Mayo/Merck/MSD/etc.
excluded_sources.reason: Potential copyright/licensing restrictions or commercial editorial policies. Not used for generated chunks.

CDC-MAT-001.title: CDC - Use of Agency Materials
CDC-MAT-001.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
CDC-MAT-001.license_notes: Most CDC/ATSDR website information is public domain with attribution and non-endorsement requirements; exceptions exist.
